title: Bean Planet Modpack
description: bean planet but with some extra mods
body:
this is a modpack version of bean planet which makes it a bit more uhhh BETTAR TO PLAY? 

(bean planet is still in very early beta so don't expect updates)

modpack includes a lot of mods

the features added are such as 2 new dimensions
more types of ores and bars
a new boime
new structures 
a lot of craftable items from something simple as a sapphire block to something as complex as an automatic assault rifle and more 
stuff
